image_requests.prompt: Extreme close-up macro shot of a person's closed eye and ear, deeply asleep, soft warm peach skin. Just beneath the skin surface, barely perceptible, the impression of ancient Roman cursive script glows with a very faint warm gold light — as if the words are written inside the flesh, absorbed through dreaming. The text is translucent, ghostly, internal. Absolute black background. Single rim light from above, warm amber. Shallow depth of field f/1.4. Color palette: warm peach skin, faint gold glow, absolute black. Mood: words entering the unconscious mind, ancient and intimate, the body as a vessel for old wisdom. Cinematic, hyper-detailed, 8K, no violence, no text overlay.
image_requests.purpose: Right side of composition — the dreaming modern receiver; warm peach skin and ghostly Latin script glowing beneath the surface makes the metaphor (ancient words absorbed through sleep) physically visible

image_requests.prompt: Marble bust of Marcus Aurelius, classical Roman emperor sculpture, white and grey veined marble with fine ancient texture, slightly weathered. Lit by a single warm amber candle from the lower left, dramatic chiaroscuro with deep cast shadows. Very dark near-black background with faint distant stars barely perceptible in the void. Bust at three-quarter view facing slightly left, expression serene and timeless. Color palette: cold marble white, warm amber candlelight, absolute black void. Mood: ancient, ethereal, quietly commanding, the weight of two thousand years of silence. Cinematic 8K photorealistic high detail.
image_requests.purpose: Left side of composition — the ancient speaker and source of the whisper; the candlelit marble bust against starlit black immediately identifies who is still whispering across two millennia

html: STILLWHISPERING
why: The diptych splits the canvas into an ancient left (Marcus Aurelius in candlelit marble, fading into the void) and a modern right (a sleeping eye with Roman script glowing beneath the skin), so the thumbnail is literally the two-thousand-year journey the video promises — ancient source on the left, modern mind receiving it on the right. Both images share the same warm amber-on-black palette, so they merge naturally across the dark center rather than fighting each other. 'STILL' runs at 194px — 50% taller than 'WHISPERING' — because it carries the entire emotional shock of the hook (present tense, impossible, intimate), and Cormorant Garamond was chosen because its Renaissance-era Roman typographic lineage means the font itself is a physical echo of antiquity, whispering at the viewer before a single word is read.
title: Fall Asleep to Marcus Aurelius — The ENTIRE Meditations for Sleep
